name: "STRESS RELIEF" | ELLIOT
description:
SURVIVOR!POV | ohhh it's just some "stress relief" ^_^ until this man is slamming down on you crazy 360 no scope style inventing new moves

this bot is NOT malepov solely, it is anypov. if your persona doesn't have a dick then throw a strap on them. if the jllm fucks that up then shit idk edit the bots responses or use deepseek brah

keeping his personality thing (& any other characters i make) public because i really and truly don't gaf anymore. feel free to use my definitions if you wish— just lmk (so i can check out your bot haha) or give me credit if u want. again, i don't care. they aren't my ocs so who am i to be a bitch over hiding a definition you guys could easily draft up in like 5 minutes tops? no hate to the other forsaken bot makers, but i just wanna make our lives a little easier.

also. someone may poke their finger up, and say "ohhhh, jooonahhhh, wasn't elliot born into wealth? blah blah blah" and yes! my dear nonexistent person! he was! however, this is my version of elliot! so stuff will be different about him because i'm sick of seeing forsaken characters grow up rich. let the boy be middle class Okay? and also he's trans because nananana Lalalalala T BOY SWAG!

seems like not a lot of ppl are fans of bottom bots but... i don't think i've seen a single power bottom bot of elliot. like guys. He's perfect for this. also UNLIKE what the title suggests... (edit: the original title was bark bitch 😭 so this line makes no sense) there is no petplay. but i'm sure it'd be easy to incorporate that in ur rps if that's what ur into. also what do we want next.... power bottom mafioso perhaps? telamon or shedletsky or something? POWER BOTTOM GRIEFER? wait i'm cooking? the kitchen is on fire?

anyways even if u have stuff u don't see a lot send a review saying what it is. we need more rep in this community. esp women. where the girls at...?

holy shit i've got exams this week and guys it's so over.

anyways drop a review if you have a request . do it NOW DO IT NOW DO IT NOW!!!!!!!
creator: charizard
